title: Follow The Equalities
prompt: A dragon guards the hatch. Complete its proof to earn the key.
help: This room holds 3 lemmas — finish them all (turn every wip into qed). (1) Helper. symmetry(T, a, b) then ⊢ a = b; by h;. (2) Helper. transitivity(T, a, b, c) cases; by h1; and by h2;. (3) Uses sym and trans. by trans(a, b, c, h1, sym(c, b, h2));.
